payload.content: Before emitting the query, check that it does not duplicate the question verbatim. The query should target evidence not yet retrieved in hop 1; if your draft mirrors the question, rewrite it to focus on an entity or relation that hop 1 did not surface.

rationale: Mirror of HoVer vbo_distinct_from_hop1. HotpotQA's GEPA prompt has weak coverage of this rule ("avoid restating the answer") — this feature tests it as an isolated single-rule lever.
